summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 Priority features for CrossCurrent Finance Center. All backend APIs pass 100% (21/21 tests). All frontend E2E tests pass. Member Management, Trading Signals, and Profit Tracker features are fully functional.
passed_tests: Frontend: Member Management page loads with stats cards ✓
Frontend: View member details with Profile/Statistics/Activity tabs ✓
Frontend: Edit member profile (name, timezone, lot_size) ✓
Frontend: Create Signal dialog with profit_points multiplier ✓
Frontend: Simulate Signal dialog (Super Admin only) ✓
Frontend: Signal History table with Multiplier column ✓
Frontend: Profit Tracker page loads with summary cards ✓
Frontend: Simulate Withdrawal dialog with fee calculation ✓
Frontend: Reset Tracker dialog with warning ✓
Frontend: Initial Balance Setup dialog for first-time users ✓
critical_code_review_comments: All P1 features implemented correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Backend APIs handle edge cases properly (pagination, filters, validation)
Trading signals support custom profit_points multiplier (default: 15)
Simulated signals are properly marked with [SIMULATED] prefix and is_simulated flag
Profit tracker reset endpoint properly clears all user data

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All P1 features verified via E2E testing

seed_data_creation: Created test user (TEST_Updated_*) and test signals during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features verified working: 1) Member Management - search, filters, pagination, view details with tabs (Profile/Statistics/Activity), edit profile, suspend/unsuspend, set temp password. 2) Trading Signals - create with custom profit_points, edit, simulate (super admin only), delete. 3) Profit Tracker - initial balance setup, add deposit, simulate withdrawal with fee calculation, reset tracker. Backend test file: /app/tests/test_p1_features.py

mocked_apis_list: Heartbeat user verification - non-blocking for development

member_management.search: Working - searches by name and email
member_management.set_temp_password: Working - sets password with must_change_password flag

trading_signals.simulate_signal: Working - Super Admin only, marked as [SIMULATED]

profit_tracker.reset_tracker: Working - clears all deposits and trade logs
